steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what function the highlighted portion serves. The narrator calls the gym scene 'nothing funnier' and names it The About to Pass Out Show — the key signal is amusement.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — describing an actual show: treats the narrator's joke title as a reference to a real movie or program, which the passage does not support. ✗
  • Choice B — expressing excitement about school: introduces a purpose about school that appears nowhere in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C — describing an activity the narrator finds amusing: matches the narrator's explicit statement that nothing is funnier and the playful name given to the scene. ✓
  • Choice D — identifying a problem: invents a concern or difficulty that the passage never establishes. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
